name: viva-parintins
description: Jogo oficial do Festival Folclórico de Parintins 2026

scripts.build: mkdir -p www && cp index.html manifest.webmanifest sw.js www/ && cp -r icons lib www/
scripts.cap:add: npm run build && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:open: npm run build && npx cap open android
